title: Java instanceof
summary: The Java instanceof operator is used to determine if a given Java object is an instance of a specific class or interface. In Java 14 the Java instanceof operator has been extended with new, pattern matching functionality that makes it more concise to use when downcasting after an instanceof check.
content: The Java instanceof operator is used to determine if a given Java object is an instance of a specific class or interface.
